pr-evidence/source-document-chunk-metada.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially found that the branch was uncommitted and that surplus metadata could be silently dropped; both were fixed, then GPT-5.5 approved the committed branch with no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 69 passed
what_changed: Added optional per-content-chunk metadata and static chunk metadata to `SourceDocument.from_texts(...)`.
Validated chunk metadata with the existing metadata helper and rejected unknown metadata chunk IDs.
Documented chunk metadata usage and added workflow/governance tests.
pr-evidence/source-document-chunk-metada.why: Cachet source documents need provenance, section, page, or review identifiers on reusable chunks without forcing callers to construct every `SourceChunk` manually.
